title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
